patch:
--- a/datapath.v
+++ b/datapath.v
@@ -23,7 +23,6 @@ module datapath (
   alu_32bit alu_inst (
     .operand_a(x),
     .operand_b(y),
     .opcode(op),
-    .result(out),
-    .extra_port(1'b0)  // BUG: 'extra_port' does not exist in alu_32bit module
+    .result(out)  // FIXED: removed non-existent '.extra_port(1'b0)' connection
   );
 endmodule
